  "stem": "设 X 是内积空间,则下列论述正确的是 ( )",
  "options": [
    {"label": "A", "text": "任取 $x, y \\in X, |(x, y)| \\leq \\|x\\|\\|y\\|;$"},
    {"label": "B", "text": "若 $\\lim_{n \\to \\infty} x_n = x, \\lim_{n \\to \\infty} y_n = y$, 则 $\\lim_{n \\to \\infty} (x_n, y_n) = (x, y);$"},
    {"label": "C", "text": "设 $x, y \\in X$, 则 $\\|x + y\\|^2 = \\|x\\|^2 + \\|y\\|^2;$"},
    {"label": "D", "text": "任取 $x, y \\in X, \\|x + y\\|^2 + \\|x - y\\|^2 = 2\\|x\\|^2 + 2\\|y\\|^2.$"}
  ],
  "answer": "ABD",
  "answer_raw": "ABD (少选不得分)",
  "explanation": null,
  "note": null
}
stem: 设 X 是内积空间,则下列论述正确的是 ( )

options.label: B
options.text: 若 $\lim_{n \to \infty} x_n = x, \lim_{n \to \infty} y_n = y$, 则 $\lim_{n \to \infty} (x_n, y_n) = (x, y);$
